MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NACCO MATERIALS HANDLING GROUP, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
APPEARANCES: Gary A. Cerio, Esq. of Krieg, Keller, Sloan, Reilley & Roman LLP 249-8330 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. Defendant has shown that plaintiff can only show a possibility of exposure to defendant's product, which is insufficient to carry plaintiff's burden, and plaintiff has presented no evidence raising a triable issue of material fact. Plaintiff's request for a continuance is denied because it is unsupported by any declaration, let alone one satisfying the requirements of CCP 437 c (h). Defendant to submit proposed order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). (302/PJB/xSN) JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
